name: veveycrm
description: VeveyCRM MCP server — field service CRM for electromechanical repair businesses (Vikas Pioneers, Hosapete)

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all CRM accounts. Returns OEM vendors, direct customers, and end-customers with their record counts.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get full account detail including contacts, assets, open cases, quotations, AMC contracts, work orders and invoices.

tools.name: list_cases
tools.description: List service cases. Optionally filter by status or account.

tools.name: list_quotations
tools.description: List quotations with totals and status. Optionally filter by status or account.

tools.name: list_inventory
tools.description: List inventory stock items with quantity on hand, reorder level, and preferred supplier. Optionally filter to low-stock items only.

low_stock.description: If true, only return items at or below their reorder level

tools.name: get_inventory_item
tools.description: Get full detail for one inventory item, including custom fields.

tools.name: list_purchase_orders
tools.description: List purchase orders raised to suppliers, optionally filtered by status or supplier.

tools.name: get_purchase_order
tools.description: Get full purchase order detail including line items and receiving progress.

coming_soon_tools: create_case — open a new service case
update_case_status — advance case through the workflow
create_quotation — create a new quotation with line items
send_email — send a quotation or report by email
send_whatsapp — send a message to a contact via WhatsApp Business API
